prompt:
90S PLAYLIST
Realistic editorial portrait of a young Indian man in his late 20s, curly messy bedhead black hair, short natural stubble beard (3–5 day growth on chin, jawline, upper lip), NO glasses, medium-light brown skin. Wearing a white printed casual shirt with black abstract graphic prints, black-and-white patterned wide-leg trousers, black beaded bracelet on wrist. Large black over-ear headphones on ears. Seated relaxed on a modern grey sofa, one leg bent casually, slight reclined lean.Background: vintage black-and-white classic Bollywood movie posters on wall, a vase of vibrant yellow sunflowers beside him. Upper-right corner features a semi-transparent Spotify music player UI card overlay showing album art (Pyaasa vintage poster), song title and green waveform. Warm amber indoor lighting, soft blurred background, creamy bokeh effect, shallow depth of field look, cinematic warm color grade with slight vintage film tone. Vertical 4:5 aspect ratio.High-resolution editorial portrait photography. Sony Alpha mirrorless camera aesthetic. Give image
